welcome.title: Welcome to FixIt
welcome.subtitle: The fastest way to find trusted skilled professionals in Cameroon.

language_selection.title: Choose Language
language_selection.subtitle: Pick your preferred language to continue

role_selection.title: Welcome to FixIt
role_selection.subtitle: Find skilled labor or offer your services.

artisan_questionnaire.title: Data Collection
artisan_questionnaire.subtitle: Please answer the following questions to verify your expertise.
artisan_questionnaire.incomplete_message: Please answer all 10 questions to proceed.

questions.question: How many years of hands-on experience do you have in your primary trade?
What type of projects do you typically handle?
options: I work on all project sizes

questions.question: How do you usually price your work?
Do you have your own tools and equipment required for your trade?
options: Yes, I own all major tools needed
I own basic tools but rent specialized equipment
I work under a contractor who provides tools

questions.question: How do you handle client complaints or corrections?
options: I always return to fix issues at no extra cost (if it’s my fault)
I review the issue and negotiate a solution
I charge additional fees for corrections

artisan_id_upload.title: Verify Your Identity
artisan_id_upload.subtitle: Please upload clear photos of your ID card and a profile picture.

phone_verification.title: Phone Number
phone_verification.subtitle: We will send a verification code to this number
phone_verification.verify_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone
phone_verification.invalid_number: Please enter a valid phone number
